vocab.meaning: sự sắp đặt cạnh nhau giữa các quy mô khác nhau (to và nhỏ)
vocab.example: There is a striking juxtaposition of scales in my area, where century-old villas sit right next to massive corporate headquarters.

vocab.meaning: chen chúc/giành giật không gian (thường nói về các tòa nhà cao tầng)
vocab.example: In my district, dozens of luxury towers seem to clamber for space, creating an incredibly dense urban environment.

vocab.meaning: sự phát triển chiều cao không kiểm soát
vocab.example: The neighborhood has witnessed unbridled vertical growth over the last decade, turning a once quiet suburb into a mini-Manhattan.
Directly across from my apartment is a formidable structure made of dark granite that houses the national bank.

vocab.meaning: một khu thương mại đang phát triển nhanh chóng
vocab.example: Since my home is located in a burgeoning business district, high-rises are popping up like mushrooms after the rain.

vocab.meaning: sự hiện diện khổng lồ/vững chãi như một khối đá lớn
vocab.example: The new telecommunications tower has a monolithic presence that can be felt from several miles away.
The horizon near my house is dominated by commercial towers interspersed with a few remaining low-rise traditional markets.

vocab.meaning: đạt tới độ cao chóng mặt
vocab.example: Some of the penthouses in the nearby complex reach dizzying heights, offering a view that is both terrifying and beautiful.

vocab.meaning: một hình bóng oai vệ/ấn tượng (khi nhìn từ xa)
vocab.example: At sunset, the jagged top of the skyscraper nearby creates an imposing silhouette against the orange sky.

vocab.meaning: những dấu tích của quá khứ (để so sánh với nhà cao tầng hiện đại)
vocab.example: Tall, futuristic offices now tower over the small temples, which are the last vestiges of the past in my neighborhood.
